BizOps – Front-End Developer.focus: building intuitive UI and enhancing user experience across our platforms
BizOps – Front-End Developer.team_info: The BizOps team works on key areas like release & initiative management, branding, referral & programs management, user support, and minor enhancements, giving you strong exposure to both business and technology.

Application Development – .NET / Full St.focus: designing and developing full-stack applications using .NET technologies
Application Development – .NET / Full St.team_info: The Application Development team builds and maintains enterprise-grade solutions, working across front-end and back-end layers to deliver robust, scalable software.

Quality Assurance – QA Engineer / Senior.focus: ensuring product quality through comprehensive testing strategies
Quality Assurance – QA Engineer / Senior.team_info: The QA team is responsible for test planning, automation, regression testing, and continuous quality improvement across all deliverables.

L2 Support – Support Engineer.focus: providing advanced technical support and troubleshooting for our platforms
L2 Support – Support Engineer.team_info: The L2 Support team handles escalated issues, root-cause analysis, and works closely with development teams to ensure rapid resolution.

Reporting & Analytics – MSTR / Power BI.focus: creating data-driven reports and dashboards for business insights
Reporting & Analytics – MSTR / Power BI.team_info: The Reporting & Analytics team leverages MicroStrategy, Power BI, and other tools to transform raw data into actionable intelligence for stakeholders.

DataOps – Data Engineer / Analyst.focus: building and optimizing data pipelines and analytical frameworks
DataOps – Data Engineer / Analyst.team_info: The DataOps team manages data infrastructure, ETL processes, and ensures data quality and availability for downstream consumers.

Project Management – Scrum Master / Proj.focus: facilitating agile ceremonies and coordinating cross-functional project delivery
Project Management – Scrum Master / Proj.team_info: The Project Management team drives delivery excellence through agile methodologies, stakeholder management, and continuous process improvement.

options.label: Are you a new member of the team?

step_2.message:
I'm **AI Buddy**, and I'm here to help you get started on your onboarding journey.

A very warm welcome to the team — we're excited to have you with us! 🎉

To create your personalized onboarding roadmap, I just need to know where you're joining.

Please select your **Team & Role** from the options below.

options.label: Quality Assurance – QA Engineer / Senior QA
Reporting & Analytics – MSTR / Power BI Developer
Project Management – Scrum Master / Project Coordinator

step_4.message:
Before we move on to the **Client & Business Overview**, **Business Process Understanding**, and **Team Introduction**, let's first initiate your LHH ID request and software setup.

This will enable you to get your **LHH email ID** for client communications and ensure all required tools and software are installed so you're fully ready to begin your development journey without blockers.

Let's start with:

options.label: LHH ID Request and NDA Signature

step_end.message:
Great! 🚀 I've initiated the **LHH ID Request and NDA Signature** process for you.

You'll receive further instructions via email shortly. In the meantime, feel free to explore and reach out if you need any help!

Welcome aboard! 🎊

step_other.message:
No worries! I'm here whenever you need help. 😊

If you change your mind or need onboarding assistance later, just come back and say hi!
